name: Turkey Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked Turkey Breast, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine cornstarch, ginger, chicken broth, and soy sauce. Stir well.
2. Microwave uncovered at high until thickened, stirring every 30 seconds for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Set aside.
4. In a 2-1/2 quart casserole with cover, combine carrots and vegetable oil.
5. Microwave covered at high until carrot is crisp-tender, about 1 to 2 minutes; stir after 1 minute.
6. Add mushrooms, onions, and celery. Microwave uncovered at high for 1 to 2 minutes; stir well.
7. Add soy sauce mixture, snow peas, and turkey. Microwave at high for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring after 30 seconds.
8. Serve over rice. Garnish with almonds.
